data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a scheduled start time with a check-in window. However, the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. While the linked use case mentions a scheduled start time and check-in window, it lacks concrete evidence such as API endpoints or data structures that would demonstrate this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or data confirming the scheduled start time and check-in window.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scheduled start time and check-in window.
